title: Document Check
description: Upload a scanned notice or document to check for hidden PII and scam language in the extracted text.

dropzone.prompt: Drag a file here, or click to browse
dropzone.hint: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, or BMP — up to 10 MB

loading: Reading document — this can take a few seconds...

result.reportPrompt: This result looks risky — you can file an NCRP complaint or bank dispute pre-filled with what was detected.

errors.unsupportedType: That file type isn't supported for this check.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Document scanning is temporarily unavailable — the OCR service may still be starting up. Try again shortly.
